/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cppx.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/cppx.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cppx.dir/src/funcs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cppx.dir/src/k0.cu.o -o cppx   -L/opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib /opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so -ldl /usr/lib/librt.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
